proven.claim: PROVEN: negated condition added only when alternative exists and logNode is inside it
proven.smt2:
; PROVEN: negated condition added only when alternative exists and logNode is inside it
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 249
(declare-const alternative_is_nonnull Int)  ; 1 = alternative node exists
(declare-const in_alternative Int)          ; 1 = isDescendantOf(logNode, alternative)
(declare-const neg_condition_added Int)     ; 1 = !(condition.text) added

; Code transition: guarded by (alternative && ...) — null alternative short-circuits
(assert (=> (= alternative_is_nonnull 0) (= in_alternative 0)))

; Code transition: !(condition) only added when both guards pass
(assert (=> (= neg_condition_added 1) (= alternative_is_nonnull 1)))
(assert (=> (= neg_condition_added 1) (= in_alternative 1)))

; Negation: !(condition) added without a valid alternative node
(assert (= alternative_is_nonnull 0))
(assert (= neg_condition_added 1))
(check-sat)
